pkgmetadata.longdescription: dm_control DeepMind Infrastructure for Physics-Based Simulation.DeepMinds software stack for physics-based simulation and ReinforcementLearning environments, using MuJoCo physics.An introductory tutorial for this package is available as a Colaboratorynotebook [Open In Google Colab](httpscolab.research.google.comgithubdeepminddm_controlblobmaintutorial.ipynb).
